docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY ANDERSON, NELIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, NELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAVAGO, ELENA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,080.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF SHOWED THAT SHE LOANED DEFENDANT THIS MONEY AND IS DUE REPAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, NELIA AS TO DEFENDANT RAVAGO, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-10-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAVAGO, ELENA
